print(f"UP result: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, done={last_action_result.get('done')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Blue block: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check if level completed
if last_action_result.get('done') or last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
